summary: Add AnimationPlayer state transitions to a character controller
prompt: The character script below handles movement but plays no animations. Add animation playback using `$AnimationPlayer`. Play animation 'walk' when velocity is non-zero, 'idle' when velocity is zero. When velocity.x is negative, set `$Sprite2D.flip_h = true`, otherwise false. Use `play()` and check current_animation to avoid restarting the same animation. All animation calls go at the end of `_physics_process`.
evaluation_notes: AnimationPlayer.current_animation or is_playing() check to avoid restart. flip_h for direction. velocity must be non-zero check (velocity != Vector2.ZERO or velocity.length() > 0 both acceptable).
